caption: A panoramic view of Edinburgh, featuring the Dugald Stewart Monument in the foreground and the city skyline under a blue sky, serves as the backdrop for a presentation slide. The "europython" logo, composed of a stylized white graphic and lowercase text, is prominently displayed alongside the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". In the initial stage, an overlay appears on the left side of the screen. This overlay includes a portrait of a man and the heading "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING", followed by credits listing "Chairman" of "The Institute for Ethical AI & ML", "Fellow (AI, Data & ML)" of "The RSA", and the name "Alejandro Saucedo". It also contains contact information: "CONTACT ME AT: A1C-X10". As the sequence progresses, this informational overlay fades away completely, leaving only the wide shot of the city and the event branding.
